'''Rol'Waran''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] employed by the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutts]] to oversee [[Spice/Legends|spice]] shipment on the ''[[Starmaster]]''.
